name: feature-lab-goudengine
description: Feature Lab (ALPHA-001) for GoudEngine TypeScript SDK -- desktop + web entrypoints

scripts.desktop: npm run bootstrap:node && npx tsx desktop.ts
scripts.desktop:check: npm run bootstrap:node && npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ES2020 --moduleResolution bundler --types node --skipLibCheck desktop.ts
